DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Adolphus Nwihiim's claim of exemption is off calendar. Because the judgment has been vacated, there is no basis for any judgment collection activities and thus no need to determine the claim of exemption.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Idin Kashefipour, 415-318-5709 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Sundiata Knight.
Stephan Choo, 415-543-4800 for Defendants/Moving parties Adolphus Nwihim and Rosemary Nwihim.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ADOLPHUS NWIHIIM, ROSEMARY NWIHIIM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment is GRANTED, per Defendant's declaration and in absence of evidence to the contrary, Proof of Service indicates that the purported service (Summons and Complaint and Statement of Damages) was not accomplished at defendants' residence on a member of their household. Defendant has 30 days to file a responsive pleading within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Mary Jackon, CSR#8688, 855-348-4997.(501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Idin Kashefipour, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Sundiata Knight,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Adolphus Nwihiim and Rosemary Nwihiim,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness Sundiata Knight sworn and examined.

The Court finds that Defendants failed to exercise due diligence in completing repairs at 1728 Oakdale Ave. The Court finds that Defendants acted in knowing violation and reckless disregard of section 37.10B and Plaintiff is thus entitiled to treble damages and attorney's fees under SFRO 37.10B subsection (C)(5)

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $729,000.00 (Treble damages of $118,000.00 + $125,000.00)
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $6600.00
Costs: $510.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $736,110.00

Judgment signed in open court.
